S

SalableProduct - Class in app
This class represents a product that can be sold in the store.
SalableProduct() - Constructor for class app.SalableProduct
Empty constructor for JSON loading.
SalableProduct(String, String, double, int) - Constructor for class app.SalableProduct
This constructor creates a SalableProduct object.
setDescription(String) - Method in class app.SalableProduct
Sets the product description.
setName(String) - Method in class app.SalableProduct
Sets the product name.
setPrice(double) - Method in class app.SalableProduct
Sets the product price.
setQuantity(int) - Method in class app.SalableProduct
Sets the product quantity.
ShoppingCart - Class in app
This class represents the user's shopping cart.
ShoppingCart() - Constructor for class app.ShoppingCart
Constructor that creates the shopping cart list.
StoreFront - Class in app
This class represents the store front.
StoreFront() - Constructor for class app.StoreFront
Constructor that creates the inventory and cart.
StoreFrontApp - Class in app
Main application that runs the Store Front program.
StoreFrontApp() - Constructor for class app.StoreFrontApp
